evals.name: json-schema-validation
evals.prompt: Plan adding a validation system to this marketplace that uses JSON Schema (ajv) to validate all plugin.json and marketplace.json files at CI time, replacing the current /plugin validate . approach
evals.expected_output: Multi-pass plan with ajv API surfaces VERIFIED against actual docs, clear separation of validation rules (BL) from schema library integration (EI) and file-discovery glue (CC)

assertions.text: Plan contains at least 2 distinct investigation passes
Plan has all three domain sections: Business Logic, Custom Code, and External Integration
ajv API surface is marked VERIFIED with a documentation citation
Business Logic items do not mention ajv or any specific library name
At least one existing codebase file is cited as a pattern reference
Final plan includes an implementation order or build sequence section

evals.name: dependency-graph
evals.prompt: Plan adding a dependency graph between plugins — plugins should be able to declare dependencies on other plugins, and the marketplace should enforce version compatibility and detect cycles
evals.expected_output: Plan where graph algorithms and version resolution are correctly classified as business logic, existing manifest patterns are cited, and any external library usage is verified or explicitly rejected in favor of custom code

assertions.text: Cycle detection is classified as Business Logic, not External Integration
If a semver library is used, it appears in External Integration and is marked VERIFIED
Existing plugin.json structure is cited from actual codebase reading
Plan contains at least 2 distinct investigation passes
No external library is recommended without VERIFIED or UNRESOLVED status
Plan has all three domain sections: Business Logic, Custom Code, and External Integration

evals.name: changelog-skill
evals.prompt: Plan adding a changelog skill to the methodologist plugin that auto-generates changelogs from git history, grouping by plugin and tagging by semver impact
evals.expected_output: Multiple investigation passes showing convergence, git APIs as external integration (verified), changelog format rules as business logic, skill structure following existing conventions (cited)

assertions.text: Git operations are classified as External Integration
Changelog format and grouping rules are classified as Business Logic
Existing SKILL.md structure is cited with file path as pattern reference
Plan contains at least 2 distinct investigation passes
Final plan explicitly states convergence status
Plan has all three domain sections: Business Logic, Custom Code, and External Integration
